summary: The Blood Wolf King is attacked by a mysterious assailant, Merbinger, who is trying to steal his body strengthening art. The king fights back with his tail and energy, but Merbinger seems to be gaining the upper hand. Meanwhile, General Ice Bitch Fox appears on the scene, and the king's past memories are revealed through flashbacks.
key_moments: Merbinger attacks the Blood Wolf King
The king fights back with his tail and energy
General Ice Bitch Fox appears on the scene
